data.title: FDA Approves Ionis Pharmaceuticals' Rare Genetic Disease Therapy to Lower High-Level Of Fat In Blood
data.description: Ionis' Tryngolza receives FDA approval for familial chylomicronemia syndrome, showing significant triglyceride reduction and fewer pancreatitis events.
